sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الرِّسَالَةُ تُرْسَلُ مَعَ مُسَافِرٍ أَمِينٍ.
sentences.translation: Pismo se slalo s pouzdanim putnikom.
sentences.translationEn: The letter used to be sent with a trustworthy traveller.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الرَّجُلُ رِسَالَةً إِلَى أَخِيهِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ الْبَعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek je napisao pismo svome bratu u dalekom gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The man wrote a letter to his brother in the distant city.

sentences.translation: Pismo je stiglo nakon dvije sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: The letter arrived after two weeks.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الأَخُ كَثِيرًا حِينَ قَرَأَ الْكَلِمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Brat se veoma obradovao kada je pročitao riječi.
sentences.translationEn: The brother was very happy when he read the words.
